publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-06-26 18:31:40 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Office of Government Affairs

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Files of Stephen Philip Johnson, Executive Director. Also, legislative reports from the Office of Government Affairs concerning New York State legislation, 1987-1988.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Cornell University. Office of Government Affairs. Records, #4475. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Boyce Thompson Institute for Plant Research

Commission on Independent Colleges and Universities (CICU)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes material on New York City

Land Grant and Statutory College Affairs Committee

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes annual reoprt, correspondence and meeting minutes
